case_title: SAMUEL S. LEE VS. REGINALD LOUIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-24-22)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, REGINALD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LOUIE, REGINALD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, SAMUEL S. AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, REGINALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOUIE, REGINALD PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE EVIDENCE THAT THIS INDIVIDUAL REGINALD LOUIE RETAINED OR EVER HAD HIS CLAIMED SECURITY DEPOSIT. SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL S. AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, REGINALD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2022 BY MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF SAMUEL S. LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGINALD LOUIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
